sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT user_pseudo_id)
FROM (
  SELECT user_pseudo_id
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201107`
  WHERE event_name = 'user_engagement'
    AND event_params.key = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND event_params.value.int_value > 0
  UNION ALL
  SELECT user_pseudo_id
  FROM `bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201106`
  WHERE event_name = 'user_engagement'
    AND event_params.key = 'engagement_time_msec'
    AND event_params.value.int_value <= 0
);

sql:
WITH sessions AS (
    SELECT
        fullVisitorId,
        visitId,
        visitStartTime,
        date,
        totals,
        trafficSource,
        device,
        geoNetwork,
        customDimensions,
        hits
    FROM
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*`
),
bought_youtube_product AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        fullVisitorId
    FROM
        sessions
    JOIN
        UNNEST(hits) AS hit
    JOIN
        UNNEST(hit.product) AS product
    WHERE
        product.v2ProductName = 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
),
other_products_sold AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT
        fullVisitorId,
        product.v2ProductName
    FROM
        sessions
    JOIN
        UNNEST(hits) AS hit
    JOIN
        UNNEST(hit.product) AS product
    WHERE
        fullVisitorId IN (SELECT fullVisitorId FROM bought_youtube_product)
        AND product.v2ProductName != 'Youtube Men’s Vintage Henley'
)
SELECT
    v2ProductName,
    COUNT(*) AS sales_count
FROM
    other_products_sold
GROUP BY
    v2ProductName
ORDER BY
    sales_count DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH MonthlyRevenue AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.campaign,
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS total_revenue
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231'
    AND trafficSource.campaign IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.campaign,
    month
)
SELECT
  campaign,
  ROUND(MAX(total_revenue) - MIN(total_revenue), 2) AS revenue_difference_millions
FROM
  MonthlyRevenue
GROUP BY
  campaign
ORDER BY
  MAX(total_revenue) DESC
LIMIT 1;

sql:
WITH first_transactions AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_transaction_date,
    device.deviceCategory AS device_category
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE 
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
    AND totals.transactions > 0
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
),
first_visits AS (
  SELECT 
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(DATE(date)) AS first_visit_date
  FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE 
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228'
  GROUP BY 
    fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
  ft.fullVisitorId,
  DATE_DIFF(ft.first_transaction_date, fv.first_visit_date, DAY) AS days_elapsed,
  ft.device_category
FROM 
  first_transactions ft
JOIN 
  first_visits fv ON ft.fullVisitorId = fv.fullVisitorId;

sql:
WITH RevenueByTrafficSource AS (
  SELECT
    trafficSource.source,
    SUM(SAFE_CAST(hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath AS NUMERIC)) * 
      SUM(SAFE_CAST(totals.transactionRevenue AS NUMERIC)) / 1000000 AS total_revenue_millions
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630'
    AND hits[OFFSET(0)].page.pagePath IS NOT NULL
    AND totals.transactionRevenue IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    trafficSource.source
),
TopTrafficSource AS (
  SELECT
    source,
    MAX(total_revenue_millions) AS max_daily_revenue_millions
  FROM
    RevenueByTrafficSource
)
SELECT
  t.source,
  t.max_daily_revenue_millions,
  MAX(r.total_revenue_millions) AS max_weekly_revenue_millions,
  MAX(r.total_revenue_millions) OVER () AS max_monthly_revenue_millions
FROM
  TopTrafficSource t
JOIN
  RevenueByTrafficSource r ON t.source = r.source;

sql:
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    CASE 
        WHEN SUM(COALESCE(totals.transactions, 0)) >= 1 AND MAX(COALESCE(product.productRevenue, 0)) > 0 THEN 'purchase'
        ELSE 'non-purchase'
    END AS session_type,
    AVG(SAFE_CAST(totals.pageviews AS FLOAT64)) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE 
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731'
GROUP BY 
    month, session_type;

sql:
SELECT 
    p.productSKU,
    SUM(p.productQuantity) AS total_quantity_purchased
FROM 
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201707*` s
JOIN 
    UNNEST(s.hits) h ON TRUE
JOIN 
    UNNEST(h.product) p ON TRUE
WHERE 
    p.productCategory = 'Products'
    AND p.productName NOT LIKE '%YouTube%'
GROUP BY 
    p.productSKU
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_purchased DESC
LIMIT 1;

JOIN 
    UNNEST(s.hits) h ON TRUE
JOIN 
    UNNEST(h.product) p ON TRUE
WHERE 
    p.productCategory = 'Products'

GROUP BY

ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_purchased DESC

sql:
WITH home_page_visits AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    MIN(CASE WHEN page.pagePath = '/home' THEN hitNumber END) AS home_hit_number,
    MAX(CASE WHEN page.pagePath LIKE '/home%' THEN hitNumber END) AS last_home_hit_number
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_201701*`,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '01' AND '31'
    AND trafficSource.campaign LIKE '%Data Share%'
    AND page.pagePath LIKE '/home%'
  GROUP BY
    fullVisitorId
),
next_pages AS (
  SELECT
    fullVisitorId,
    home_hit_number,
    last_home_hit_number,
    LEAD(page.pagePath) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_path,
    LEAD(hit.time) OVER (PARTITION BY fullVisitorId ORDER BY hitNumber) AS next_page_time
  FROM
    home_page_visits,
    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE
    hitNumber > last_home_hit_number
)
SELECT
  next_page_path,
  MAX(next_page_time - hit.time) AS max_time_on_home_page
FROM
  next_pages,
  UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
  UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
WHERE
  page.pagePath = '/home'
GROUP BY
  next_page_path
ORDER BY
  max_time_on_home_page DESC
LIMIT 1;
original_sql:

  FROM

    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,

  FROM

    UNNEST(hits) AS hit,
    UNNEST(hit.page) AS page
  WHERE

)
SELECT
  next_page_path,
  MAX(next_page_time - hit.time) AS max_time_on_home_page
FROM

sql:
WITH monthly_data AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC(DATE(date), MONTH) AS month,
    fullVisitorId,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS purchase_pageviews,
    SUM(CASE WHEN totals.transactions = 0 THEN pageviews ELSE 0 END) AS non_purchase_pageviews
  FROM
    `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
  WHERE
    _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170601' AND '20170731'
    AND pageviews IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    month, fullVisitorId
),
monthly_totals AS (
  SELECT
    month,
    SUM(purchase_pageviews) AS total_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_purchase_visitors,
    SUM(non_purchase_pageviews) AS total_non_purchase_pageviews,
    COUNT(DISTINCT fullVisitorId) AS num_non_purchase_visitors
  FROM
    monthly_data
  GROUP BY
    month
)
SELECT
  month,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_purchase_pageviews, num_purchase_visitors) AS avg_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor,
  SAFE_DIVIDE(total_non_purchase_pageviews, num_non_purchase_visitors) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews_per_visitor
FROM
  monthly_totals;

  monthly_totals;

sql:
WITH FirstVisit AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        MIN(visitStartTime) AS first_visit_time
    FROM 
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId
),
LastEvent AS (
    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        MAX(CASE WHEN device.isMobile THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS last_mobile_visit_time,
        MAX(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS first_transaction_time
    FROM 
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
    f.fullVisitorId,
    DATEDIFF(
        COALESCE(l.last_mobile_visit_time, l.first_transaction_time), 
        f.first_visit_time
    ) AS max_days_between_first_visit_and_last_event
FROM 
    FirstVisit f
JOIN 
    LastEvent l ON f.fullVisitorId = l.fullVisitorId
WHERE 
    l.last_mobile_visit_time IS NOT NULL OR l.first_transaction_time IS NOT NULL;

),

    SELECT 
        fullVisitorId,
        MAX(CASE WHEN device.isMobile THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS last_mobile_visit_time,
        MAX(CASE WHEN totals.transactions > 0 THEN visitStartTime ELSE NULL END) AS first_transaction_time
    FROM 
        `bigquery-public-data.bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
    GROUP BY 
        fullVisitorId
)
SELECT 
    f.fullVisitorId,
    DATEDIFF(

        f.first_visit_time
    ) AS max_days_between_first_visit_and_last_event
FROM 
    FirstVisit f
JOIN 
    LastEvent l ON f.fullVisitorId = l.fullVisitorId
WHERE 
    l.last_mobile_visit_time IS NOT NULL OR l.first_transaction_time IS NOT NULL;
